reviews.review_description: Just tested out the 40 piece water scene. You can choose from 15 pieces to 135. You build up boards of various puzzles scattered around. Each pieces are easier to align than you originally think. If you get stuck,the position auto lights up green in the correct position.  Easy to place. The animation comes alive in front of you. I would love sound too maybe later? I thought it was amazing and very beautiful creating a full jigsaw video. I don't think I have seen one like this. Full marks from me. X
I'm surprised there's no instructions.  I did mostly figure it out.  Sound would be nice.  I think the more I play the more I'll like it.

I like this puzzle, not as hard as some of the others I've played. It does light up green when your piece is in the right spot. Sound would definitely be nice. I did the rainbow and waterfall one. I love that its a video.
